triggers.prompt_regex: \b(data api|query data|records api|record envelope|memory grep|exact memory|retrieve memory|evidence bundle|turn start|observed web|web evidence|rustyweb|datawave records)\b

context.directive: Use query_data as the root records membrane. Use retrieve_memory for memory over that membrane, evidence_bundle for cited records, turn_start for working context, and observe_web for URL/API/docs evidence that should become Data API records.
workflow: Narrow records deterministically by tenant, repo, path, room, tag, source, status, validity, or exact ids before ranking.
Return the Data API envelope with records, fields, score, edges, provenance, rank_signals, cursor, trace, and degraded states.
Prefer retrieve_memory when the target is memory recall, and query_data when the user has exact filters or ids.
Use evidence_bundle when a response needs cited record packets instead of prose-only conclusions.
Use observe_web to ingest URL/API/docs evidence before web-derived facts are treated as graph evidence.
validation_defaults: MCP tools/list includes query_data, retrieve_memory, turn_start, evidence_bundle, and observe_web.
query_data degrades with remote_unavailable when native MCP is not configured.
query_data proxies to native query_data with filters intact when native MCP is configured.
